context.projectOverview: Obsidian vault storage layer — FINAL sprint (5 of 5). Sprints 1-4 DONE. This sprint adds (1) src/vault/conventions.ts: the CANONICAL home for ACTIVE_STATUS='active', SUPERSEDED_STATUS='superseded', ATTACHMENTS_DIR; (2) src/vault/profile.ts: resolveProfile(vaultDir) -> VaultProfile | {encrypted:true} | undefined, reusing the sprint-1 hand-rolled YAML parser, detecting SOPS via a top-level `sops:` key WITHOUT decrypting; and (3) a CONVERGENCE refactor centralizing SUPERSEDED_STATUS (currently duplicated in index-map.ts AND reindex.ts) into conventions.ts.

completedSprints.title: note model+I/O
completedSprints.summary: frontmatter.ts has parseFrontmatter(raw) hand-rolled YAML subset

completedSprints.title: derived FactStore index
completedSprints.summary: index-map.ts exports SUPERSEDED_STATUS='superseded' (literal); reindex.ts ALSO declares its own local SUPERSEDED_STATUS (NoteStatus-typed) used by reindexNotes status-skip

note: CONVERGENCE BUILD-BREAKER (from curator): when removing reindex.ts's local SUPERSEDED_STATUS, its `NoteStatus` type import (around line 17) becomes orphaned and noUnusedLocals/no-unused-vars WILL break the build/lint — you MUST delete that orphaned import too. conventions.ts is the single source of truth; index-map.ts and reindex.ts should IMPORT SUPERSEDED_STATUS from conventions.ts. To keep all Sprint-2 tests green (they assert SUPERSEDED_STATUS is exported from index-map.ts AND reindex.ts), index-map.ts and reindex.ts must RE-EXPORT the constant (e.g. `export { SUPERSEDED_STATUS } from './conventions.js'`) so existing import sites still resolve and the literal value stays byte-identical ('superseded'). SOPS detection: feed standalone profile.yaml through parseFrontmatter by wrapping in '---' delimiters; the parser stores a bare `sops:` line as an empty string, so detect via `'sops' in parsedFrontmatter`. resolveProfile: absent file -> undefined (NOT throw); no clock; no crypto/network/sops shell-out; never surface encrypted values. RUN ESLINT (npx eslint src/) and the FULL suite before committing — lint is a HARD GATE. Stay on branch bober/medical-team.
